description: Publish with signature.key_id whose DID portion does not match agent_id MUST be rejected with key_not_authorized (HTTP 403). Tests RFC-ACDP-0003 §2.1 step 6: the registry verifies the DID portion of key_id (everything before '#') equals agent_id, and rejects before signature verification.
notes: agent_id is alice but signature.key_id is under bob's DID. Registries MUST reject before attempting signature verification.
